The restaurant service left me disappointed both evening and morning service We were left waiting for order to be taken for bar food and I eventually had to ask to be served Wasn t much better the following morning the table wasn t set and I had to ask for a cup and then cutlery Definitely not well organised The food however was lovely   The room was amazing and had this best shower I ve been in

WIFI could have been better it was ok but not great for streaming movies  very friendly staff for such a big hotel great location for Eurostar the night before great food in the hotel and gym had what I needed

Somewhat expensive but location is hard to beat   Excellent location in very close walking distance to St Pancras station and Eurostar Staff were very friendly and helpful Breakfast was good with an extensive range of options

everything was fine I just find the bed could have been of better quality  personal was top everywhere we had contact with them room was big unexpected in London room was quite unexpected on Euston road

Room was very small and not many places to put anything No armchairs in the room   Bed was hard There was so much noise early in the morning of doors slamming and people talking It was impossible to have a rest
The lifts are temperamental One of these is often out of action Not a problem for me as I was on a low floor   The breakfast is always great in this hotel

I am a traveller pregnant lady going down to see Queen celebration and stay this hotel the hotel staff kindly upgrate my room and the room is very comfortable the location is also super close to kingscross train station

Not really anything to dislike except perhaps dining bar facilities were a little noisy and no restaurant lunch options for Sat Sun If you want intimate private dining you will have to look elsewhere Didn t like the pork sausages at breakfast which is a shame as I like my breakfast sausages   Excellent location with great accessibility from three Mainline Stations especially when travelling with luggage Very easy 5min walking access to three tube stations to get just about anywhere in zones 1 and 2 Great cleanliness upper room views and reasonable comfort and price Decent and varied breakfast

Missed breakfast as didn t know it was included and the staff arranged to make me fresh whatever I wanted so opted for scrambled eggs on toast which was delicious Absolutely superb customer experience

Lifts were slow and it took ages to find one that was not full Music in public areas was too loud   Rooms very roomy clean and comfortable Breakfast very good Close to St Pancras Kings Cross and many buses pass the front door

The attentiveness of the staff when I had made a special request was really something else I was leaving for 3 months so I asked them to just do a simple request for when I came into the room with my boyfriend Instead they called me up and asked me what he liked ended up making delicious brownies for us Absolutely amazing what they did for us Its quite simply put that the Pullman is one of the rare hotels that really cares for its customers

Check in took nearly 20 mins because the auto check in was not working and reception seemed to take a long time with the people in front of me In the evening 2 out of the 3 lifts were not working 1 in maintenance and 1 broken down given there are 15 floors or so it took forever to get a lift going up   Very convenient for Shaw Theatre and for northern rail stations We had a bedroom at the back and it was very quiet for a central London hotel Bed was very comfortable the bathroom was very clean and well appointed but overall the room was a little austere I think the hotel has recently been refurbished because everywhere was very clean and well maintained Breakfast at 20GBP seemed expensive but there was an amazing choice of good quality food so you just had to tuck in to get value for money and you could take time over your meal too The staff were very polite attentive and helpful
Final bill seemed to show it cost nz124 for a packet of peAnuts and 2 drinks A bourbon and a Baileys at the bar Query to be submitted  Location and excellent staff service

I was on the 4th leaving I waited 15 mins for a lift finally having to carry my case down the stairs glad I was not any higher Stairs not properly marked went Down with two other couples to find an alarmed only exit door at the bottom returning to 2nd floor for proper staircase to get down
On check in wrong bed size was allocated which was later changed after we complained   Booked for a Kingsize bed which we eventually got Could really spread out on it Breakfast was stocked

There was a specific woman at the counter that checked us in who was so rude But another staff member sorted us out later   The gentlemen that brought our suitcases up was so kind and even helped us in getting a better room

Poor air conditioning led to a poor sleep overnight could not get a breakfast on Saturday before our Eurostar left but the receptionist arranged a breakfast box for us to pick up  Very convenient for st Pancras

Loud piped music in foyer and restaurant which was turned up in volume in the evenings two lifts out of three were out of order so it took ten minutes just to get to ground floor   Cleanliness comfort and quietness of our room the view over towards the British Library and St Pancras

No complaints everything excellent  The staff were excellent My husband was unable to travel at the last minute due to a foot injury The staff pulled out all the stops to make up for me being on my own in the city on what should have been our 29th Wedding Anniversary celebration They provided me with a room upgrade a glass of bubbly an early check in a beautiful cake to celebrate the occasion a wonderful breakfast cocktail and regular checks to see if I was ok Nothing was too much trouble This was an emotional time made better by care and attention to detail Check in and check out was straight forward Lovely food and great choices for evening meal and breakfast
Tried to reserve a table in restaraunt even though many tables were empty and remained empty we were told that we couldn t eat for another two hours   The pork pie hats

I don t stay in hotels often and I organised the stay for 12 of us 6 rooms and I was not expecting the amount of details required when we checked in and it took a long time We were all booked in separately and amongst much confusion as some of the receptionists were just checking us in and some were insisting on knowing who was in which room and cross checking our list against who had already checked in at one of the other desks Also our luggage seemed to get muddled up when we left it behind reception again it took a long time to sort it out The only other thing that affected us was the lifts I think one was out of order and it made it difficult to get down to breakfast as the hotel was apparently busier than usual Some of our party tried to walk down the stairs but couldn t find a way all the way to the ground floor   The breakfast was amazing And we weren t rushed Although we were unable to get staff to clear and set up our table which had been used We then had mixed results when we requested hot drinks but overall it was a relaxing and satisfying experience Also the head receptionist was very savvy and on the ball she was helpful and aware of how she could help us

towels looked a bit old considering it s been newly refurbished they probably just need to be bleached or something to restore that crisp whiteness   My biggest fear when looking for a hotel is the state of the bathrooms and carpet so it took me a week of trawling through reviews and researching online to finally decide on a hotel to stay in And boy was it a relief and pleasant surprise when I arrived at this hotel As a professional interior designer myself I appreciate the style of the hotel decor very modern but warm and tasteful I know those wall coverings didn t come cheap It s quite evident that whoever was responsible for the design was meticulous and applied a very high attention to detail Concierge services were generally very accommodating Although when I called one evening asking for ice I was asked to contact room service directly the concierge from the previous two nights must have passed on the request to housekeeping without asking me to do it myself so being asked to contact room service directly was a bit of a put off It wouldn t have taken much effort to pass on the request to room service from the concierge s desk would it Housekeeping team was very thorough with the cleaning I found the room to be very clean and fresh and actually better in reality than the pictures I d seen online I particularly loved the lavender sleep aid that was left at the bedside it worked a treat

i didnt think the hotel was worthy of its star rating as the rooms were small and not nice very dark and obviously been designered beyond need without understanding a guest only focussing on the dark felt headboard design the carpets were not so clean glasses were dirty and i had to call for fresh ones the shower room partition was nice in appearance but putting a toilet roll on the side of the bath fixing meant it became wet when the shower was used The mirrors steamed up fully and rendered them useless There was no guest slippers and i was pleased i brought my own face cloths It was evident that the hotel had focussed on appearance but not functionality having a full size ironing board in the long drop wardrobe section wasn t useful at all and the cut backs on guest facilities was in the wrong places tea and sugars literally stuffed in a tin on the side was very poor no valance on the bed showing the bad base was very poor the concierge was unable to give clear directions to the location and we were driving around to find parking which i understood was in the hotel but we found out was in another hotel over the main road a few hundred meters away the breakfast room s light but again very modernised and designered to look something its not really a prime example of Fur Coating something that s not covering its bare essentials first i could go on but really its not worth it as the hotel has fudged its star rating and i was extremely disappointed i will revert back to my previous hotel nearby for future bookings the lancaster is much better and has some quality in its tradition   the choice of vegetarian sausage to make a real breakfast only took 15 mins to cook fresh and deliver to the table

My husband and I were very disappointed with our 2 night stay at the Doubletree by Hilton London Kensington We came to the UK from Abu Dhabi for 5 days the main purpose of the trip being for me to have an operation We booked the hotel expecting to have a relaxing and comfortable last 2 nights in London post operation We booked a Queen Guest Room and couldn t believe what we saw when we arrived to our room a tiny dark and pokey room with no space outside of the bed and about 2 inches from the window was a concrete wall it felt like a prison not the kind of room you would find in a Doubletree by Hilton hotel and totally overpriced for 165 pounds per night We complained and as an act of goodwill one of the managers moved us to a suite for the same price He showed us the room and as we were rushing to go and grab some dinner neither one of us asked why it was so hot assuming the air conditioning was just switched off In actual fact the air conditioning was broken we had just one fan and this was during one of the hottest spells in the year So what appeared to be a goodwill gesture was indeed nothing more than a disingenuous token to shut us up as the manager would have known the air conditioning was broken when he offered us the complimentary upgrade When we returned from dinner and moved rooms we came into a hot and stuffy room which although better than the first room was very uncomfortable We had planned to stay in the hotel room the following day so I could relax post operation however this was not possible due to the lack of air conditioning We were given an extra 2 fans which did not make much difference so spent 2 sleepless nights in the hotel During our stay we noticed other guests complaining about the lack of air conditioning and issues connected to it like leaks in their rooms The staff were not overly concerned about the complaints   The breakfast was fairly good

The staff were so friendly helpful Alex Iriine helped us negotiate cabs directions tours The bar dining room staff were delightful the food drinks delicious
The bed for our daughter was an old sofa bed It offered no support and was completely inadequate We were not offered a suitable alternative so we left The hotel has refused to refund us
We were in a room with a door outside for the corridor the second floor everything someone went past and pushed the door it would slam shut   Location was good and staff friendly

Our room was quite small Trying to separate the two twin beds was difficult because of the lack of space and the night stands that were fixed to the wall   Very good location within a ten minute walk of South Kensington tube station Friendly and helpful staff

It is annoying to queue for breakfast in the morning The hotel is even well aware of the issue Why don t you offer breakfast free of charge outside of rush hour to alleviate the issue The rooms at the Hilton Honors floor are ridiculously small It is like coming into a room in a Manhattan hotel All claims regarding rooms being in sophisticated style should perhaps be augmented by saying that it would help if guests are not above 4 11 and or 42 kg Then there is one annoying detail which the reception should be aware of but apparently they are not as they are handling customer s credit cards all the time Instead of asking upfront if the customer wants to pay the hotel bill upfront the hotel staff makes reservations on your card checking if the card is ok What they do not realize is that standard MC and AMEX services are such that reservations get stuck on your card effectively for a month Thus I got away with a small bill paid in full the hotel is not that expensive but the reservations on my card were at the same order of magnitude being very annoying Travellers like myself who are travelling often would not like to have outstanding reservations on our credit cards at the same magnitude as what we spend per month on hotels I can live with the small room but I am annoyed about this kind of ignorant rude behaviour towards even Hilton H members   The location on Queen s Gate is unsurpassed Try living in South Kensington with 200 meters up to South Kensington Station which is I admit a bit difficult in terms of getting luggage to and from the Piccadilly Line platform and if you have a car Queens Gate is the only street in the vicinity where there is a decent chance of getting a parking spot Walking distance to Royal Albert Hall and to Kensington Garden brilliant Location is close to a 10
The staff welcomed us the second we stepped out of the taxi at the front door and their attention continued right up until the last second of our stay Perfect location for visiting the museums

It would be great if there is a mini refrigerator in the room although its size small as much as House keeping staff could be more careful since there is rubbish on the floor when I come back to the room in evening   Breakfast and registration staff are wonderful to treat gently and genuinely Many thanks for Khadi and Irene

My only complaint will be about air con in room Wasn t good enough for the heatwave London experienced on week of our visit   Very clean and lovely room excellent location wonderful staff Excellent breakfast

Only doonas on bed No sheet under doona and no blanket in cupboard It is always good to be able to have a choice of bedding preferences available without having to wait for staff to bring it if available No shower cap provided   Great location Comfy beds

Front desk staff Our dry cleaning was not picked up when requested Both my brothers room and mine were charged for his and my dry cleaning Had great difficulty getting this sorted out Rang the foom at 10 00pm to renegotiate the cost of the room Will never stay there again   Location and cleanliness
Fantastic hotel with amazing courteous staff Room had everything you would expect from 4 star Hilton I had a room at the rear of the hotel so there wasn t any noise from the busy street

Cleaning of the rooms is soo bad never seen this before they dont even wipe the water stains from the vanity and sink mixer my hair was left there The mattress is so bad my back still hurts Housekeeping started cleaning the room next door at 8 am on a saturday leaving the door open while using the vacuum how nice is that   Only the convenient location close to the station

No fridge as per most UK hotels Maybe hotels need to consider getting rid of the bath Hard to climb over the side of the high bath and dangerously slippery at times thats common in most UK hotels also   Staff very friendly and efficient Room a bit small side but very comfy Could walk around the beds ok 2 suitcases hard to Place Shower fine Breakfast excellent Hot choices and pleasant dining area Excellent wifi and tv reception Location perfect Late check out 1200hrs and given an extra hour also that was lovely Also able to check in earier than advertised time much appreciated clean rooms

Maybe the option of a mini bar fridge in room and maybe some toothpaste However this is me just picking I will be staying again Thank you   Staff were amazing and offered our every need Lovely location and very clean would be staying again

waited in check in queue for a good 20 minutes and then charged 30 in advance for any potential room charges Air con didn t work Went down to front desk at midnight to request a fan which never arrived   very comfy beds very central location near to some great little eateries and 5 minutes walk from South Ken tube
Swift check in and check out Staff very friendly and helpful Room clean and comfortable Free cookie on arrival was a nice touch Good location plenty going on nearby

To be honest nothing   I was wondering why this hotel rate is 7 9 It was a great hotel with great service and attitude from the staff Even the Internet which mainly all comment talked about is free and so fast it better than any other hotel

The Front Office staff who checked us out 3 different rooms is not knowledgeable incapable in the individual billings I was charged twice to my credit card for one invoice FO staff needs training and be flexible to request for changes to names in the invoice   location
Breakfast and size of room  The staff were very helpful however the size of our room was tiny and I wouldn t class it as a deluxe room which is what we paid for the breakfast was tasty but cold

Our air conditioner was broken and the room was very hot The staff seemed somewhat indifferent They did offer a fan and suggested we open the window Sadly the street noise was unbearable so we closed the window and sweated it out for two nights as the hotel was booked full The third night they did move us to a cooled room which was wonderful We were grateful for that In the second room everything was clean and well kept All the glassware in the first room had obviously been used By prior guests as there were lip marks and fingers prints on them We had expected the second night we would have received clean glasses but we got the same ones over again For a hotel which could be top notch with such little effort this was disappointing I wish I could give top marks and really want to say I loved this place but it fell short They are so close to having a really great hotel so I hope they will address some of these issues   The beds were comfy and the public areas were all very nice The breakfast and the dining room staff were wonderful The location could not have been better just blocks from South Kensington tube and Kensington palace Museums very close walking distance We enjoyed the neighborhood very much

The shower door didn t close and we didn t receive a welcome cookie on arrival but these are only very petty niggles otherwise a pleasant stay   Great central location clean attractive d cor the hotel in general has a nice feel to it Breakfast also good

I m gluten and dairy free I was really looked after and couldn t have wished for anything better I was even offered soya milk and got gluten and dairy free bread which was a bonus Couldn t thank them enough as I was able to eat the same as everyone else instead of feeling like the odd one out

I booked 2 suites and their was only 1 available They gave me a 20 rebate on 1 suite but I feel they could have done more This was a very special week end for my family as we were celebrating my daughter s 30th birthday and also her engagement Not a very good start to the celebrations

i Wish the windows would open as I don t prefer air con ii Parking is difficult however there is a suitable car park albeit rather expensive near the hotel whilst on Sundays we parked on single yellow lines  i Breakfast buffet was good and cooked food tasted fresh most important ii The staff were very helpful iii We enjoyed the location iv Premises and rooms were very clean
The hotel facilities and location was excellent Very handy to the tube and tourist attractions Kensington is such a pretty place great shopping and restaurants

We stayed for 7 nights and the food was exactly the same every morning Some variety on the breakfast buffet would help Also our daughter s roll out bed was not comfortable  Fantastic location Very friendly staff

In a two week trip through 3 countries this was the only bad hotel accommodation and it was the worst I have ever experienced at this level hotel in US or abroad The rooms were awful The bed and pillows were hard as rocks It was so hot in all 3 rooms we tried A C broke in first room Moved from a suite to a twin after begging for a room with A C Originally told they didn t have another room They were going to force us to stay in the broken a c room and rent the one we ended up in probably We were lied to repeatedly Hot in the new room as well and 3 of us on 2 twins pushes together At 3 am I had to go to desk and ask for fans Next time we had a Room with a loft for the bathroom and double bed The loft was so hot It was on the top floor Heat rises There was a small box a c that ran continuously but never cooled off the room There was a crying baby in the next room that sounded like it was in the room with us The traffic outside was so loud in the room as well That happened in 2 of the 3 rooms There were 2 green lights on the ceiling of the loft I think to light up the stairs that stayed on permanently and it was like daylight in the bedroom It had a skylight with no cover so at the crack of dawn more light streamed in After repeated attempts with management we had prepaid in full so they didn t care we literally left in the middle of the night and went to a much more expensive but lovely cool quiet beautiful hotel to get one good night s sleep in London It was the best move we made and we should have left after the first incident This is our 4th trip to London always in the heat of summer and the only bad experience we have ever had with our hotel accommodations I have never had to complain to management about a hotel room before in London after over 20 nights worth of accommodations Management was barely apologetic   Location was fantastic close to a tube station museums Hyde Park and lots of great restaurants

The room and breakfast were prepaid and still we had to pay 30 deposit We booked a twin superior room and got a room on the 6th floor just under the roof very hot small window no curtains airco didn t work good They offered us another room on the same floor which we didn t take because other guests on the 6th floor had all the same complaints If you book this hotel don t accept a room on the 6th floor even is it is a superior room   Good location and friendly staff breakfast was ok but nothing special

Air conditioning did not work in the room and was very hot Staff could not help but offered a fan The breakfast was the same food every day and hardly eatable   The beds are comfortable but smaller then American standards The rooms are puny Location is what defines thins place

The room was not ready when we checked in second time We were not expecting it to be ready at 12 30pm when we first arrived but when we tried to check in after 14 00 when they said it would be ready we had to wait 30 minutes and we were not the only travellers who had the same experience One couple were checked into a room which was already occupied There was no leadership of the reception staff and there was an element of chaos which could have easily been resolved by some senior staff present to reassure guests The hotel has only recently been taken over by Hilton and they need to sort this out quickly as this is a very popular hotel for returning guests Breakfast was ok but not worth 18 50 which you would have had to pay if it wasn t pre booked   We have stayed here before when it was the Regency Hotel and wrote a very positive review about the attention to detail of the staff and of course its wonderful location It is also a lovely building and our room a queen room was beautifully air conditioned This was definitely essential given the hot and humid weather in London

The bed mattresses were a little too soft and not very supportive Small rooms   Great wi fi Great service Clean rooms Lovely modern clean bathrooms Close to wonderful restaurants parks underground Lovely local community
No mini fridge had to climb stairs to rooms on 2nd floor elevator doesn t go to second floor   Nice location quiet and close to an underground stop

A C broke in middle of night It s rarely hot in London but this summer has been an exception It s unbearable Asked for A C to be fixed while we were out for the day Came back about 12 hours later ready for bed and a c still broken No one ever came Took 2 hours to get moved from a 2 bedroom suite to a single room with 3 of us in a new room Ridiculous Spent time on phone with manager Had to go to front desk to get action and that still took an hour Moved to a small cramped room that heated up about 2 am Had to go get fans from front desk then Absolutely no sleep with a small hot rooms and 3 people on 2 twin beds pushed together Barely apologetic the next morning Noted they are renovating and have had trouble with a c so they knew about it but only wanted to give a small discount off the down graded hot room we were moved to Poor customer service I warned them I would be posting a bad review for their service and asked for it to all be corrected They didn t seem to care so the best response I know is to follow through Would not stay here again if I had an option   I love staying in Kensington as it is out of the way of the busy part of London but close by tube to the heart of the city There are better hotels to stay in than this one

The 2 hour delay in checking in The large crack in the window that meant that the traffic noise is early morning was unpleasant The automatic light in above the bedroom door which would not go out final solution from night porter was to disconnect the fuse   The location

I have stayed at many Hilton hotels and found that the room was very small for the price I paid There was hardly any room to move around in the bathroom and I am not a big person

Room was like a broom cupboard with sanded but unfinished patch of plaster on wall Breakfast was ok but nothing to write home about and the second morning most items were tepid at best   Location Staff all attentive and friendly

I am 90 yrs old and there was an uneven floor with a 4 inch rise where I could easily have fallen and broken my neck The room was ready 46 minute after it was promised Instead of a room the receptionist offered me a cookie hardly what I wanted   Convenient location for my purposes

The breakfast was not included in the price which was very disappointing We also reported that the shower light was broken at 1pm on Saturday afternoon By the time we had a shower at 7pm it still wasn t fixed resulting in us showering in near darkness   The location was key to us booking it as well as being able to check in before 1pm The Staff were very polite

The hotel was over booked and the place was chaotic breakfast was a complete shambles and totally disorganised The rooms were small and in need of a makeover Definitely not 4   The beds were very comfy and the hotel was is a good area which was within easy walk of the nearest underground station

Arrived early and wasn t expecting room to be ready When I returned at 2pm to check in I had to wait until 3pm for our room A little maintenance needed in the room as the window was broken and door hinges covered in oily residue   Check in staff very friendly Bar and restaurant staff very helpful Hotel main areas very well kept Breakfast buffet good selection

No fridge in the room The bed is clearly near the end of its useful life The room was much smaller than I expected pretty tiny especially for two people Pokey gym   Desk in the room Clever and attractive lighting Location close to several underground lines served by 2 stations in a beautiful suburb

Cleaning staff careless on soap replacements and water replacements Rather than cleaning an obviously dirty linen they just turned it upside down Cleaning staff leaves used towels on the sink neither replaced nor put away Have travelled a lot and this staff was below par for such a hotel chain The official shampoo lotion in the rooms virtually impossible to use they come in these lean tall cylindrical bottles that are too hard to squeeze any product out of and the rubber top too tight for product to be shaken out What a waste of product money Don t think this was EVER tested by those that designed those bottles Water pressure in showers very low Not THAT close to subway stops   Welcome staff concierge friendly and helpful

Avoid the terribly overpriced breakfast joint nearby It looks nice but tt was quite terrible  Comfortable and convenient if a bit pricey But that s London I suppose Twin room a little small but well equipped and perfect for a two night stay

My room wasn t cleaned for two days despite information to the reception three times After the third time I went for dinner when coming back they had literally thrown some towels on my bed thats what they called cleaning see photo attached if you don t believe it I couldn t trust my eyes seeing this In a four star hotel that is I then insisted on receiving another clean room In booth rooms the aircon was not working it was boiling hot Water pressure was so low that water only comes out dribbling when i tried to order dinner to the room I was told I will receive a call back which I never did As it was already midnight when I returned from work I then went to bed hungry reception desk staff doesn t know the area I was sent in the wrong direction twice when asking for the way to the Themse

Rooms were very cramped with a huge carpeted step not clearly marked which was a big trip hazard You had to ask to get adequate soap and towels Staff struggled to speak English There was no fridge at all in room I have never seen this before in a 4 star hotel especially a Hilton I requested an iron twice and it never arrived although I was told it would come straight away both times In all a very disappointing experience Then to top it off when we checked out we were charged twice We realised immediately and were told this was normal as they process the credit card on registration so you pay up front although were were clearly told pre authorisation is NEVER PROCESSED but then on discharge you pay bill completed with extras They do not reverse original charge for up to to a week later Their attitude and handling of our complaint on this was very much that they don t care In all this was my a good experience I would never recommend this hotel and will not stay at Hilton again   Room was clean As it should be That s the only positive I can find

Nothing  The minute we walked in the door we felt so welcomed by all of the staff and throughout our stay They were so nice The bed was so comfortable and the rooms were very quiet The breakfast in the morning was brilliant The food was extremely fresh and there was loads there The location was excellent with only a short walk to the many restaurants and South Kensington Station

Air conditioning did not cool the room enough The shower was absolutely horrendous It basically dribbled on you The bed was uncomfortable And it was my partners 21st and I requested something a little more for his birthday maybe even a balloon to make the trip perfect but that seemed to be ignored   Room was very clean Reception area very lovely In perfect location

Arrived at hotel 2 20pm to be told our room not ready Very disappointing when we were told we could book in from 2pm We needed to get ready as we had early table booked at a restaurant and evening show When finally showed to our room just after 3pm the air con wasn t working and the room was very warm We were moved to a smaller room around 3 20pm which left less than an hour to get ready This did somewhat spoil our experience as we had a long journey so no time for a rest The air con in this room stopped working in the middle of the night which meant a very uncomfortable nights sleep The staff were apologetic and did try their best to help but there seemed a lack of overall leadership in the Reception area which probably needs addressing Surprisingly for a hotel of this standing there was no visible bar so when we ordered drinks they weren t poured in front of us The staff disappeared to what may have been a kitchen and then reappeared some time later with the drinks When paying 17 for 2 drinks it would have added to the experience to have seen them being poured at the bar   Breakfast was excellent as were the staff waiting on Very attentive friendly and helpful Very clean Staff helpful and cared for luggage on day of leaving so that we could sightsee without it

Thick wire hang in a loop along 1 wall near ceiling not a good impression although not dangerous   Room was clean Bed very comfortable Great bathroom Breakfast was lovely Staff efficient and friendly Late check out

Aircon although set to coolest setting was almost unnoticeable This could be improved   Room was clean well furnished and location was fantastic Good value Perfect for Kensington palace and the museums Great local restaurants
Toiletries rather scant insufficient for two people   Staff very efficient friendly breakfast plentiful attractive hotel overall very pleasant stay

The very noisy air conditioning unit It was still noisy even when switched off This was reported to the reception about 6 00pm but nothing was done therefore a restless night   The location

the room was quite noisy on an evening therefore I would ask for a room without a street view Child s pull out bed was very narrow and the metal frame when opened I thought quite dangerous   Staff were very friendly and efficient The location was perfect and within walking distance of the tube station with lots of cafes and bars located nearby

Room location was a bit up and down Evening eating service was not good waited over an hour for soup roll and fries which were cold Sound proofing could be better 5am showering and shaving not appreciated   Friendly staff on arrival and in the breakfast room Room clean and adequate

Since the hotel got acquired by Hilton they have forgotten to look after their previous customers aligned to the regency hotel Most of us came along because this was a boutique hotel These days it s really catered for the tourists and such and lost its way for customer service It s all about revenue I guess I have stayed at this hotel since 2002 I and my team will be looking to stay somewhere else in the future if opinions don t change for the better   What I liked about this hotel is more important to me then what I like this time round This hotel is great the staff are good and the location is fantastic for London

Have creaky bed fixed Maybe larger tv with accessibility to wider variety of channels   Croissants were actually very tasty Our bed in room 242 was creaky

Could not obtain cold water from the bedroom taps You could not seal the bath plug which was reported but nothing done about it   Comfy beds Good breakfast

Took 4 attempts to find a room we were happy with due to positioning of air conditioning units right outside of bedroom window Reception staff didn t seem to understand the extra noise was an issue  Nice decor in the room comfortable beds and room was clean
I really can t think of anything   For being my first time in London they made my stay very comfortable They were very friendly and courteous and the service was great

rooms are too small I picked two single bed room the rooms are not big enough for two single bed they only diveded the bed into two nothing a real two single bed room also staff were not able to solve any problems the check out took almost 40 min wasnt easy to pay money by credit card they were not well experienced  good location

first room had a water tank above it that was noisy all night second room had an aircon unit outside and washing up water in the kettle all in all very disappointing

Nothing Everything was perfect   Felt very welcome great friendly reception staff and even more amazing bellhops can t fault them at all Worked extremely hard never left anybody struggling with luggage Clean hotel room amazing facilities and even great shower Didn t want to get out Hope I will be back soon

It wasn t worth the money I booked 2 queen superior rooms for the same price and found that one was much smaller and cramped compared to the other In fact there was just enough room to walk around the bed in the smaller one When I brought the issue to the reception I was told that that s just how it is which is ridiculous Asked to change rooms and found ourselves in a reasonably sized room on the top floor but it was stuffy and old and not up to the standard you d expect from Hilton or The Regency Also the rooms and had electrical wiring stapled to the walls in the open Not at all worth 190 a night   I loved the comfort of the bed You just sink into the pillows

Really sorry to say the bed was really uncomfortable we both just fell in a hole each side of the bed was so tired couldn t Be bothered to be moved to another room and have the same experience so never said anything

My wife elected to pay for the stay via cash This caused problems when checking out as it was not reflected on the computer Thankfully she had kept a copy of the receipt Even after showing the receptionist the receipt there was still problems thankfully they were resolved but i dread to think what would have happened if i hadn t kept receipt  Everything was exceptional quality except the checkout process

The room was nice but the location a bit noisy Room 143 Good location excellent staff and food very good  The staff were excellent very helpful and accomodating The bed was really comfortable and food was very good We would stay here again

Perhaps nitpicking but the room had obviously been redecorated with a largish patch in the ceiling not painted over and also near the window on some plasterboard Cabling leading from bed head over to window not chased in or covered just tacked   Great location excellent bed and good bathroom Staff are very polite and friendly Stayed here previously two years ago and would stay again

The bar lack of the drinks we ordered and bar staff We had to queue at breakfast time on sunday even though half of The tableas were empty  The location Nice touch the cookies offered at reception Reception staff very friendly and professional
Walls between rooms provide very little acoustic barrier which meant that I got little sleep one night due to the person in the next door room being very ill all night   Super comfortable bed

I had some issues with the cold water in the bathroom The shower was fine but the sink tap did not have any cold water   The bed was incredibly comfortable I appreciated how clean the room always was when I got back and really loved the location The cookie at check in was also a great perk

From some of the reviews I had read people had stated that the rooms were on the small side I mentioned this at check in and we were shown a room that was absolutely fine 10 minutes walk from tube station and museums Some excellent restaurants in the vicinity We were travelling to Heathrow after our stay the Piccadilly line was easily accessible Would definitely stay again

my daughter gave deposit on her debit card then when we paid our bill her money was frozen she could not get this sorted for six days after we came home she spoke to staff in hotel they said a new member of staff should not have taken deposit on a debit card then said it was up to her bank to sort it out her bank said no nothing they could do as it was paid to your hotel very disappointed as she had no cash other than what was in her account and she could not get it sorted by the hotel staff

the bed was so soft it was vey difficult to sleep there were a lot of noises in the room from the pipes from the rooms next door there were people running and loud in the hallways both nights at 2 and 3am the 6th floor was under construction and repair with plastic on the floor and lights dangling from the ceiling and the elevator that would not reach the 6th floor where I had my room This would definitely qualify for a discount   well situated the staff was friendly

Bathroom was a bit small the attitude of when we asked if we could check in early which we had previously requested and told it would most likely be possible However when we arrived and asked we were told no very quickly felt like she didn t even check also she didn t ask if we would like to drop our bags so had to carry them all day   The cookie on arrival the big comfy bed Close to a good choice of restaurants and only a 10 minute walk from subway
All great   Surprised on the morning of my birthday with a cake with a candle in it Such a lovely gesture Everyone was so happy full of smiles and wishing me happy birthday

The shower in bathroom was difficult to adjust to right temperature Otherwise no problems   The location is very good Less than 10 minute walk from tube station with easy reach of Leicester Square Hotel was comfy and clean with friendly staff

Strangely awfull system where you cannot add your frequent flyer or Hilton Honours number in the property although on check in t was said to me I could do it at a later date Before check out in the reception they told me I could not do it because I had made the reservation through Booking com and I should have done it previously Bar is still the same boring place as before   Nice change with the new flag in terms of personnel sympathy

Rooms on 1st and 2nd floors can only be reached through mezzanine level and stair access only Finding room is a bit of a maze For those taking tube note that South Kensington and Gloucester Road stations are not step free  Clean well run hotel near South Kensington museums and shopping Very helpful staff who assist cheerfully Recently renovated
The pillows weren t good Not overly comfortable Breakfast was expensive but a little less we would have paid   The staff at reception were very good
Just the price was a little high for a 19 year old but a great stay made up for that   Lovely staff so helpful Clean and very tidy Comfy beds and nice modern cosy room

There was nothing we didn t like except the fact we only booked for one night  Before entering the hotel we could see it was a great place upon entering the hotel was greeted by the staff took my bags as I checked in friendly and kind considerate staff

The crackly duvet and pillows weren t to my taste but I m sure most would find them comfy The room was a bit noisy even with no air conditioner on at night   The staff could not do enough So friendly and helpful The food was delicious Beautiful shower

Not enough variety for breakfast and not worth the 20 you can get the same sort of breakfast in a Travelodge or premier inn for less than half the price Also could of done with more light in the room some of the lights went off way too quick I get the energy saving but they could stay on abit longer before turning themselves off  The suite was great very comfey and the bed was massive

The bed was broken and so uncomfortable the room was way too small There was no fridge The bath was tiny and the shower was terrible and very slow They didn t offer movie channels only offered free view tv which was very poor Parking is very pricey unless on weekends when it s free There was no view just stuck in an end room with a view of a back road Rooms very close together can hear other people in other rooms   Breakfast was really nice fresh room was very clean can t complain Staff was friendly Location wasn t bad

Our first room smelt of sewage There was no source of cold drinking water as the taps were hot only and there was no minibar We had to wait 20minutes to be seated at breakfast before another waiter falsely accused us of stealing a table very upsetting and there was very little breakfast on offer with flies in the drinking water   The reception staff were very kind and courteous and acted very promptly to move us from our first bedroom which smelt of sewage
Excellent free continental breakfast courteous and professional staff This hotel used to be called the Regency and we have stayed there many times The new owners are just as good or better

Despite the hotel not being full we were initially given a room right next to the ventilation fans for the kitchens which droned on an on We asked if there was another quieter room and were offered another room   Friendly helpful staff An issue with the room being noisy it was next to the ventilation units for the kitchen droning on was sorted quickly and efficiently

Mattress and pillows too soft and made us too hot they may have been the tempur style we are both used to firmer pillows and mattress i am sure if i asked it may have been possible to change but we were only there 2nts and it wont stop us from returning which we hope to do in April this is one of those things where personal preference is hard to satisfy with so many thousands of people staying   The staff seemed very genuine friendly and welcoming I hate it when someone says have a nice day with no eye contact its so insincere The hotel was really lovely furnishings decor fire in lobby location The restaurant staff were excellent and the breakfasts were excellent too tasted freshly cooked and not mass produced and kept warm like so many places I am disabled and nothing was too much trouble and the approach from staff to me was just right helpful and supportive without taking over I really appreciated that

The room was slightly smaller than we had previously expected and beds a little to firm   This hotel offered very well presented room accommodation with lovely modern facilities Staff where exceptionally helpful as well as being knowledgable of the surrounding area

The room we had wasn t as nice as we expected The was a hole in the roof from what looked like someone had hacked open to fix electrical cabling but hadn t patched it up The shower head was broken and made showering difficult Also we order water in the morning because we were feeling a bit worse for wear and we got a bottle of warm water   Staff on arrival were welcoming and made check in easy Location is near UG station and the natural history museum

It is a maze to find your room very strange and easy to get lost in the building The rooms are tiny like in HK Low water pressure in shower No fridge in room   The bed was so comfortable and although the building is old it has been remodeled so that everything feels new There a fireplace in lobby very welcoming Breakfast was great with many options on buffet Good restaurants walking distance GBK and convenient stores bakeries etc
That we were the only ones dining in the restaurant So it lacked atmosphere but we must say the food was excellent   Friendly staff Location Comfortable rooms Welcome cookies
Room 618 Noise all night long from the emergency or lift door next to the room like someone slam the door Even during afternoon Not having a good sleep and nap for 2 days we stayed there
Lower levels are a bit noisy with sounds of garbage trucks very early in the morning Corridors are winding and narrow   Clean good location free WiFi
Everything the staff were extremely helpful and could not do enough for us so so professional we will definitely stay here again a truly amazing experience Thank you

There is a button on the phones that say room service which obviously you press whenever you want room service However someone at the hotel rang us on the room phone at 4 30am waking me and my 84yr old grandma up just to check if we wanted room service Very rude and inconsiderate She doesn t sleep very well anyway and this pointless unprofessional disturbance we felt ruined the whole stay   Very good location Certain front desk staff were very helpful and friendly Concierge was fantastic
There were some issue with the temperature it was either too cold or to warm And the room was quite noisy  The room was very beautifull and clean The staff is very nice

we had a very poor experience The hotel had been taken over by the Hilton group 2 days before I had 10 points to present to Management After several discussions phone calls and e mails we had our money back   Location

the hotel that we booked as the regency hotel that we ve known for long had been bought and without our knowledge we came into a huge construction site i was told that within two weeks the hotel had to be updated with firedoors each floor was ripped up it was dusty and loud and the alarms went off while stressed out workers were sneaking under the your bed to hook up air condition leaking detectors or leaving heavy machinery on the floor in the hallway we were moved to a duplex but the furniture was worn and not very practical the one hing that pushed me over the edge was when it took them 48h to react to my complains that the toilet seat wasn t clean as well as the coffe maker used with dirty water and missing supplies full of plaster fingerprints finally i got really upset when i noticed that the workers were allowed to enter the rooms withoutbsupervision while we were out with strange very unleasant things happening footprints and dust on the bed my clothes pushed to the side inside the closed the iron etc moved out and left coffee maker and toilet used and the small cosmetics gone from the bathroom i ve had smaller issues with room serice in the past but this time i had to virtually go to buy cleaning supplies and wipe the toiet also the much praised lounge was closed when supposed to be open and i ended up getting invited to help myself to fetch some water from the Just one thing I put up a do not disturb sign on the door but the cleaners still cleaned the place That is cool at all Please take care of that   Most the things were good

Standard rooms are too small for 2 adults with 2 suitcases with no space to store anything so we had to upgrade to a larger room No minibar no hair body care products Staff was quite short and not very friendly except the doorman NO GLUTEN FREE PRODUCTS for breakfast  Great comfy beds Can open the windows tea coffee making possibility

Rennovation was taking place at the time of my stay therefore was very noisy Toilet was not cleaned on a daily basis mugs were dirty   Great location modern hotel very close to 2 main tube stations friendly staff
Shower head wouldn t stay up Small plastic shampoo bottles etc were so hard impossible to get the shampoo out especially with wet hands   Great location Good night s sleep

Not exactly major but the breakfast choice of only two small conserve pots marmalade and strawberry jam on each table is plain daft if not downright mean There should be a much wider choice available say near the toast machine so that clients can select what they want and not what they re told to have I m quite partial to honey and I don t want it out of some big pot as was the case   Polite friendly and helpful staff A lovely comfortable building Excellent location

Room wasn t ready on arrival at 5pm Had to wait until 6 No offer of refreshment Reception staff unhelpful Restaurant closed for function alternative room very poor The staff were frustrated and were heavily carried by their supervisors Building work everywhere including fire doors propped open This well situated hotel under Hilton needs to improve considerably   Location very good for central London Close to the Albert Hall and Kensington shops Rooms spacious and comfortable

my card was pre authorised and money locked out of my account had to pay with a different card staff weren t very helpful in solving this issue its been 2months since Iv stayed there and I still haven t got this issue resolved so Iv effectively paid twice otherwise it was a great trip but this spoiled it a bit  Great location very central

New Year s Day morning 9 20am house keeping entered my room three times and disturbed my sleep within 45 minutes Not good enough   Reception staff were extremely helpful and polite Location was great 5 minutes walk from south kensington tube station
Bath was a little small but I am only writing this as a very minor point   Staff were lovely couldn t have been more helpful Room was clean and very comfortable All in all a very nice experience

The pillows are not very comfortable And there was only 1 small bottle of water provided in the room for drinking No water provided for tea cofee making   Near the train station nice hotel facade Helpful staff

The hotel was in transition to becoming a Doubletree We were not told at check in but we had to switch rooms during our stay due to construction staff was unhelpful with giving information and locating our luggage We had to store since we were taking tours during the day and needed to store our luggage because they couldn t get us another room until people checked out Wasn t informed at booking that the hotel was going to be under construction Not sure we would go back in the future since Hilton took over they will probably increase the room prices and the renovated room they switched us to was fine for our price but not an increase   The area was easy to get around Great location next to the museums restaurants and metro tube stations On the day we left they did store our luggage while we did last minute touring and called a taxi for us since the holiday crowd was making it difficult to take metro with luggage to the airport
We would like to have a mini refrigerator in the room For family vacation we would like to have a room fits four for two adults and two children instead of having two rooms   Location

Housekeeping didn t clear rubbish and lack of toiletries  Hotel changed to Double Tree whilst there so a bit of renovation going on but did not inconvenience us Housekeeping did not clear rubbish a couple of days and toiletries left a lot to be desired in the bathroom no cotton buds etc we had s great stay however as it s an excellent location Concierge were helpful in booking our Christmas Day tour We would stay here again

We had a disastrous 2nd night got a morning call at 4 45am for the wrong room no sooner got back asleep and the fire alarm went off a couple of times phoned reception during the 2nd alarm and got no reply so assumed this was an actual proper fire alarm everybody was out in the corridor we got dressed and followed them to reception the porter left us standing there as he proceeded to check out other guests eventually I interrupted to ask about the alarm while it was still going off and he just said he was busy checking out false alarm no explanation he could of at least put a sign up on the reception to say false alarm instead of leaving us stand there for at least 5 mins guests were not at all pleased in our corridoor Alarm went silent went back to bed and again it went off needless to say we got no more sleep so much for a relaxation stay the next morning on checkout no apologies or explanation The room was too hot our first night on returning back to the room there was a septic smell from the drains as we had left the bathroom door open and the fan was off The second night we made sure to turn off the heating and keep the bathroom door closed The room was clean though and the proximity of the hotel made up for it So if the Management could improve on these problems along with a the night porters politeness I would rate the Hotel 9 10   Excellent Location for shopping sightseeing restaurants etc Fabulous area a short walk to south kensington underground where just around the corner you can get top class brunch or afternoon tea at Murials Kitchen not to be missed

No handle on internal door due to painting and decorating Could not access corridor to our room We were facing a wall and on the ground floor   The fresh cookies were perfect The hotel was very clean South Kensington tube about 3 minutes walk from hotel Muriel s kitchen near tube station for breakfast great

Tried to charge me the agreed price per night rather than the 2 nights Took a big fight for them to check Booking and no apology when they accepted they were wrong Hotel is undergoing renovations that were never disclosed Noisy by day and workmen needed to be in our room 5 times in one afternoon even though my wife was ill and trying to sleep   Good location close to South Kensington tube Staff ok

I was unaware the hotel had changed hands in October until I received an e mail from booking com the day before our visit not sure who was at fault booking com or the hotel for that one I had booked a club suite in June as a special treat we arrived at the hotel early so booked in stored our luggage and went out for a while We returned later to get our key and were given our room number We went to the room to find that instead of the suite we had booked we had been given one of the smaller rooms in the hotel When we returned to reception and spoke to the manager he told us that the room was being worked on and that we couldn t have it None of this had been said either before our visit via e mail to booking com who had my details nor during the booking in process or when we collected our key despite the fact that the receptionist had the booking details in front of her printed from my computer at the time of booking us in It felt like it wasn t important and that they hoped we would just accept it and not complain As a result of our complaint we were given a discount on the room Initially this did put a damper on the weekend and had there been an option we may well have left Having said all this as indicated above we were not unhappy with the service the hotel provided my issue is with the communication and lack of understanding of the effect their actions regarding the room change had on what should have been a special weekend IF we return there in the future I will certainly be checking we get what we ordered   The accomadation was clean and comfortable and the staff friendly The breakfast was plentiful and good

We had an awful experience at this hotel 1 We had booked the Duplex Suite however on check in we were told we weren t able to have this room because it wasn t available Why let somebody book a room that is unavailable We were offered 30 discount and an alternative room but as we had booked the top room this room didn t match up to our expectations 2 We were not told before arriving it wasn t advised on the hotel website that on the day we were booked in to stay the hotel brand would be changing to Doubletree by Hilton The staff were all over the place and didn t have a clue what they were doing throughout our whole stay It also felt as though the General Manager was unable to actually help us and just kept repeating that it was due to the brand swap and next time we will have an enjoyable stay 3 This may sound petty but I know it bothers a lot of women I know when staying in hotels the mirror at the dressing table is quite high in comparison with the low seat to do your hair make up 4 Due to the inconvenience at check in we then didn t have enough time to grab some dinner before going to a show we had booked We stayed in Covent Garden for a couple of drinks before heading back to order room service which we had seen on the 24 hour menu in our room When calling reception room service was unavailable because of the hotel brand swap Why put menu s in rooms Therefore we didn t eat at all as it was too late to go anywhere else 5 After complaining about the room service scenario we were offered either a bottle of champagne in the room or a two course meal we took the champagne offer after seeing the restaurant the evening before didn t fancy sitting in an empty restaurant with zero atmosphere They then said they didn t have any so we got a cheap bottle of white wine   The only thing I can comment on about this hotel is the fact it is only short walking distance from a tube station and it is in a very nice area of London
The hotel was undergoing major construction I wasn t made aware of this at the time of booking The staff were poorly trained and we experienced unnecessary delays at check in
Building work going on early in morning Security lights in room came on to disturb sleep Room much smaller than picture suggests Desk staff not helpful   The location was great for access to west end
I was given noticed of change of hotel 9 hours before check in Very unprofessional by both Hilton and booking com both will never get my business again   Not much maybe the welcome fruit

Only that we booked their sister hotel near where we were for the evening and we were moved with very late notice for me to find another closer hotel due to refurbishment Otherwise all good   Staff were so helpful and friendly Food very good Clean comfy room Good bar area which was spacious and well decorated for Xmas

The rooms are very small and you can hear every breath If someone walks in the corridor it feels as if they are in your room There is massive constructing going on which we were not told about prior to booking The hallways are filled with workers Wifi in the room didn t work There was an Xmas party going on until 2am with drunk people running through the hallways and the base and music irritating anyone who wanted to sleep After several requests nothing was done Wouldn t recommend staying there

We upgraded our room as we were offered discounted upgrade a few days prior to arrival The room was dark and dingy looking out onto a brick wall Changed back to our original choice which was light and airy and much more pleasant The club lounge was very poor continental breakfast was dreadful Only went in once There were refurbishment works ongoing throughout the hotel We were not pre warned about this It was rather noisy with workmen and fire alarm going of continuously on one morning   Staff were polite and helpful

The fire alarms were being tested on the Tuesday morning a note was placed in the lifts telling guests this but not all the guests had read the note maybe individual notes to each occupied room would have been better   Even though the hotel is undergoing refurbishment it did not detract from a lovely stay All staff we had contact with couldn t have done enough to make our break more enjoyable
It would have been nice to have been informed of all the building works that were taking place prior to our stay There were builders and dirt everywhere  The location was great very close to tube etc
The ongoing renervations there was no mention on the website There were many messy areas in the passageways and hallways However we would go there again   The staff the location and our stay
We were not informed on booking that there would be construction work going on so even on a Sunday there was a lot of banging going on Will not be returning   Not a lot

The room was small especially the bathroom which could only just about fit one person in My partner is 5ft 10 and only just fitted under the shower The room had some unfinished aspects for example wall sockets have been removed leaving behind undecorated square patches The most annoying aspect of the room however was if you turned on the bathroom light a large light in the bedroom then came on which couldn t be turned off very frustrating in the middle of the night and you are woken by it   The location was good the staff were pleasant and the room was very clean

I staid in club room which was tiny and very cold There was much noise and dirt as they were reconstructing hotel when I was sraying there No hairdryer One bottle of washing gel for all body hair   Great location and very friendly personel

Sadly the hotel was let down by the male staff in the main entrance concierge and reception There were no smiles or greetings from them and in fact we had to smile or talk first before even getting a response All three men we encountered seemed less than happy to be there The female staff were a lot more friendly The beds were the most uncomfortable I have ever encountered with my mattress sloping to one side and no springiness at all There is also a ridiculous lighting system in the room When the bathroom light is turned on the light by the door and also a main bedroom light also switch on You can imagine in the middle of the night when one of you goes to the loo and the whole room lights up Worst of all is you can t turn them off I called reception and was told the lights are connected and on a timer so you just have to wait for them to turn off By this point though you are both wide awake Someone has to change this as I ve never seen anything like it Also the fire alarm went off in the morning as we were getting up but we weren t told there would be a drill   The location is excellent very close to the tube the park and shops It is a very beautiful road The decor and presentation of the hotel is also very good modern and clean
No wifi in the room and no basic toilet things supply Room window too high felt like in a completely closed space very uncomfortable  Location very good

Great location close to South Ken tube shops etc Nice having the restaurant they made espresso too Only a easy cab ride from Paddington so travelling in from Heathrow Express was very easy or you could use the tube too and then it would be a 5 minute walk

The room was very hot I do not like air conditioning because of the noise and naturally we did not have the heat on and we couldn t open a window This is ridiculous and unhealthy Also the pillows on the beds were like slabs   The hotel is very nice and I appreciated how clean it was The beds were extremely comfortable and our room was very quiet This was all marred however by the fact that the room was sweltering and we couldn t open a window WHY
No real bar Breakfast dreadful   location good Free Wifi Club suite was a good size Clean modern bathroom Check in staff very friendly and helpful
The bedroom looked unfinished there was a big paint splodge on the wall And the bed was very uncomfortable  The location was perfect for what we wanted

Hated that I had to continually contact the front desk to keep the wifi active   had an upgraded room which was 2 floors Made it much nicer to stay with my kids
Hole had been cut in wall and ceiling above bed and still very visible Television not connecting to their media hub coffee in room guff The room just looked tired   Staff and location

Nothing that comes to my mind  Excellent Location and good value for money when compared to other Hotels nearby Some rooms have included a free light breakfast that was enough for me

Noise from kids in a nearby school had to pay for WiFi Hotel collected deposit of 50 pounds from my card and i did not receive it within a week after the refund was made   Very helpful staff and value for money Good location in terms of the vicinity beautiful

The breakfast was the normal buffet fair with rubbery scrambled eggs and shoe leather bacon all for the very reasonable 16 I was staying at the hotel due to its proximity to The Royal Marsden as my wife was having a serious operation I had booked 2 nights stay while my wife was to be in Critical Care unit On the Saturday it was clear she would be staying another night So I booked another night I was preoccupied and tired with the stress of my wife s situation I assumed it would be at the same rate as I had paid through Booking com When I checked I had been charged 159 which more than the previous nights I checked on Booking com for their rate which was 128 When I pointed this out the Recepyion staff shrugged their shoulders I had been charged the hotel full rate and she would not consider reducing the price I was too tired and preoccupied to put up a fight at the time as I wanted to see my wife This left a disagreeable taste in the mouth and I would not recommend the Regency to anyone I know   The room was nice and the facilities ok I would have excepted a fridge in a room of this price

1 The deposit is not needed at all One should also be able to choose of mode of payment especially if you are using different currencies and cards 2 Evertyhing looks just fine but you can even hear the flush of the next room and they are supposed to be a 4 star hotel soon I don t get that

breakfast wasnt that great choice of egg and beans should just be a standard on breakfast and toaster not working  our room was upgraded to a 2 floor suit which was nice and also the coffee machine made lovely coffees also access to the premium lounge was good

The Staff were very friendly and welcomed us The room was clean and warm and comfortable and would recommended it to others We would like to stay at this hotel again

for the price it was a terrible view staff all had chips on their shoulders and were extremely unhelpful would not recommend it nor would i be back

Rooms were not as advertised My room qas little more than a shoe box Badly lit rooms and a tiny window Felt like a prison cell than a hotel room   Location ia great

The staff from recption was rude i and my wife stayed two nights there the first night theres a sound from under my bed i called reception they sent someone to come and said he can hear that but theres nothing he can do then i called reception again theres no more people to answered

The staff wasn t the friendliest I have encountered They were not very personable but more like robots One morning we had only hot or scalding water coming out of the tap as mentioned by another reviewer We also lost wifi for several hours and had a false fire alarm at 1 am which was frightening The room was extremely small club twin as was the bathroom It was quite overpriced for the size of the room   The memory foam beds were quite comfortable and the rooms were clean The location is great for South Kensington with two major underground stations very close by and many restaurants and grocery stores all in very close proximity
